key_signals: Higher-timeframe CVD and whale flow remain positive: 4h delta_fut +38337.315 and +35591.616 on the last two closed 4h bars, with 4h fut_whale_delta_notional +75086230.64472 and 1d +110194784.19649
Auction structure is still supportive: price 2107.6 is above 7d AVWAP 2068.72, above 1d TPO VAH 2103.32, and still above 4h TPO VAL 2100.67
Immediate upside is capped by buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 and bearish_absorption at 2114.31 just under the 2116.35 session high
flow_context.story: Cross-timeframe flow is bullish overall but with immediate resistance-driven cooling. cvd_pack is mixed by horizon: on 15m the latest bar printed delta_fut -2294.013 and delta_spot 8.4208 after a prior -6390.152 and -411.1173, so the very short-term tape is soft; on 4h the latest closed bar printed delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.3794 after +35591.616 and +682.2765, so the higher-timeframe tape is still accumulating; on 1d the current session is softer at delta_fut -22903.317 and delta_spot -5920.7228, but that follows a very strong 03/14 daily bar at +319331.814 futures delta. whale_trades matches that pattern: 15m fut_whale_delta_notional is -4998122.1472, but 4h is +75086230.64472 and 1d is +110194784.19649, so large players are net buyers on the dominant horizons and only sellers locally. tpo_market_profile is also supportive: 1d TPO has tpo_vah 2103.32 and price is above it, while 4h TPO has tpo_val 2100.67, tpo_poc 2108.51 and tpo_vah 2116.35, placing price in the upper half of current value. absorption is mixed by location, which matters: bullish_absorption at 2097.91, 2100.09 and 2101.67 shows bids absorbing sells at support, while bearish_absorption at 2114.31 shows offers absorbing buys near resistance. buying_exhaustion is short-term bearish because the strongest recent event occurred at pivot_price 2110.17 with score 0.9999999999995852 and spot_exhaustion_confirm=true just below the 2116.35 high. selling_exhaustion is bullish on dips because it showed at 2107.21, 2097.6 and 2082.12, with the latest 2107.21 event scoring 0.9029993888183018 and spot_exhaustion_confirm=true. vpin is high at 0.6910335999999071 with toxicity_state high; that is not directional by itself, but it says reversals or squeezes can travel quickly once a structural level is engaged. The immediate micro battle is reinforced by orderbook_depth liquidity walls at bid 2102.17 and ask 2113.96. Net result: higher-timeframe flow stays bullish, but the market is currently distributing under resistance rather than cleanly trending through it.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in a higher-timeframe bullish regime, with the 1d trend firmly up and the 4h trend still advancing above AVWAP and above prior value, but the 15m has shifted from impulse into balance after rejection in the 2110.17-2114.31 zone. In practice, 1d is the directional backdrop, 4h is the continuation structure with key support at 2100.67, and 15m is the timing layer currently rotating between support around 2101-2103 and resistance around 2114-2116. The dominant context is bullish continuation, but immediate upside is not clean while local exhaustion, bearish absorption and short-term whale selling keep capping rallies near the session high.

15m.story: Current price 2107.6 is bracketed by bullish_absorption support at 2101.67 and bearish_absorption resistance at 2114.31; those levels are reinforced by the nearby orderbook bid wall at 2102.17 and ask wall at 2113.96. I label 15m Sideways because the market is rotating after an intraday squeeze rather than cleanly trending. The bullish side of the data is real: ema_trend_regime output_sampling 15m is bull, ema_13 is 2108.34, ema_21 is 2108.42, ema_34 is 2108.4, 7d avwap_fut is 2068.72 so price_minus_avwap_fut is 38.88, bullish_absorption printed at 2097.91 with score 0.6715256933612713, at 2100.09 with score 0.7656807464302182, and at 2101.67 with score 0.6771711012955965, bullish_initiation confirmed at pivot_price 2100.39 with score 0.6247883519503773, spot_break_confirm=true and spot_whale_break_confirm=true, and selling_exhaustion printed at pivot_price 2107.21 with score 0.9029993888183018 and spot_exhaustion_confirm=true. But the live intraday auction is weak enough that I cannot call it Bullish: price is below 15m rvwap_w 2108.5199010146744 with z_price_minus_rvwap -1.05, below the 15m profile poc 2108.53 and val 2107.88, below the current 4h session tpo_poc 2108.51, the latest 15m CVD bar printed delta_fut -2294.013000000001 and delta_spot 8.420799999999993 after the prior bar printed delta_fut -6390.15200000002 and delta_spot -411.11730000000176, footprint 15m window_delta is -2387.6710000000003 with stacked_buy=true and stacked_sell=true, whale_trades 15m show fut_whale_delta_notional -4998122.1472000005 from 1 buy vs 7 sell prints, buying_exhaustion hit at pivot_price 2110.17 with score 0.9999999999995852 and spot_exhaustion_confirm=true, and the latest bearish_divergence measured price_diff 2.43 against cvd_diff_fut -1.5957801838608847 into the 05:40 high. Those bearish signals contradict any outright bullish label, but I overrode a Bearish call because the 2098-2102 support cluster keeps holding and the broader bull regime still frames the move. The result is a conflicted, range-bound 15m state rather than a clean directional trend.

1d.story: Current daily structure is Bullish with support 2103.32 and resistance 2116.35 from the active daily TPO profile; tpo_vah is 2103.32, tpo_poc is 2101.41, tpo_val is 2086.48, and the current day has traded 2081.59 to 2116.35 after opening 2095.28. The daily price structure is clearly rising: daily closes have stair-stepped 1992.28, 2035.39, 2050.99, 2072.6, 2091.01, 2095.27 and now 2107.6. Trend regime confirms that move: ema_trend_regime_by_tf 1d is bull, ema_100_htf 1d is 1919.99, ema_200_htf 1d is 1880.89, 7d avwap_fut is 2068.72 so price_minus_avwap_fut is 38.88, and 1d rvwap_w is 2083.8197058812 with z_price_minus_rvwap 1.8; price is above the +1 sigma band at 2097.1771515330547 and below the +2 sigma band at 2110.5345971849097. Auction placement is also bullish: price_volume_structure 1d has poc_price 2096.0, vah 2098.37 and val 2070.44, so price is trading above daily value, and the daily TPO value area 2086.48 to 2103.32 has already been accepted higher after initial_balance_high 2095.76 broke. Flow confirms the larger bull: footprint 1d window_delta is +59181.60100000002, whale_trades 1d fut_whale_delta_notional is +110194784.19649015 and spot_whale_delta_notional is +1669809.9748. The main contradictions are that the current daily CVD bar is softer, with delta_fut -22903.317 and delta_spot -5920.722800000005, and the short-term tape printed buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 plus bearish_absorption at 2114.31 just under the 2116.35 high. I overrode those because they are late-session resistance signals inside an already established daily uptrend, while the broader daily structure, value migration, whale accumulation and persistent trade above AVWAP and RVWAP remain decisively bullish.

4h.story: Current 4h structure is Bullish with support 2100.67 and resistance 2116.35 from the active 4h TPO profile; tpo_val is 2100.67, tpo_poc is 2108.51, tpo_vah is 2116.35, and price 2107.6 is still above the session initial_balance_high 2103.58.
